detail.instructions: Define ConfigLoadError with MissingEnvironment, InvalidPort, and FileRead variants. Derive thiserror::Error and give every variant a concise #[error(...)] message.

hints.body: Use thiserror::Error instead of handwritten Display and Error implementations.
Place one #[error("...")] attribute on each variant.
Keep variants semantic; messages are presentation.

detail.completionExplanation: ConfigLoadError is a normal typed Rust error without repetitive formatting boilerplate.
